title: The Cavelands
description: The Cavelands is a mod, which adds a new cave dimension below the bedrock
body:
The Cavelands is a mod which, apart from the 1.18 update, increased the depth of the minecraft caves It works by adding a whole new cave dimension with unusual new biomes, new ores and new resources!
The dimension itself is also named "Cavelands"

You can explore the endless caves in the Cavelands, mine new ores (such as manganese) or even build your base there!
Tip: Mine Deeprocks in the Overworld below y-level 30, to suddenly wake up in an infinite cave



Music by Derek Fiechter's Music.
Suggest your ideas!
